Status: Planned
Owner: <owner>
Created: <yyyy-mm-dd>
Linked proposal: <path-or-none>
Linked spec: <path-or-none>

Linked plan: <path-or-none>

## Goal

State the PR-sized outcome.

## Production delta

List expected files, modules, commands, workflows, or docs that should change.

## Non-goals

List what must not be pulled into this slice.

## Acceptance

List concrete review criteria.

## Proof commands

List exact commands reviewers should run.

## Rollback

Describe the smallest safe rollback for this slice.

## Claim boundary

State what may be claimed after this slice lands and what remains unclaimed.
